prompt: Firma COMBIN BANSKA STIAVNICA, s.r.o. (ICO 31631134) ma kontrakty za 16.4M EUR v CRZ. Over ci je registrovana v RPVS ako partner verejneho sektora.

assertions.name: searches_rpvs
assertions.check: Agent navigates to rpvs.gov.sk and searches for ICO 31631134

assertions.name: reports_registration_status
assertions.check: Agent states whether COMBIN is registered or not

assertions.name: evaluates_missing_rpvs_risk
assertions.check: If not registered: DANGER flag. If registered: extracts UBO data

assertions.name: notes_contract_context
assertions.check: Agent notes 16.4M EUR in contracts as context
